name: chittyagent-dispatch
description: Single-source-of-truth projection for ChittyOS agents/skills/hooks. Reads `chittymarket/canonical/<name>.md` and projects to every runtime format — Claude Code agents, Codex skills, OpenClaw agents, ChatGPT GPT configs, Notion agents, and the agent.chitty.cc orchestrator KV index. Eliminates per-runtime forks; canonical is the only file edited, projections are generated.
